title: thymus vulgaris var. hyemalis
intro: Thymus vulgaris var. hyemalis, also known as winter thyme, is a variety of the thyme plant that is commonly found in Europe and is known for its small, oval-shaped leaves and pink or purple flowers. The medicinal properties of winter thyme include its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of winter thyme include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Winter thyme can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or added to food and drinks, and it can also be used in potpourri and other crafts due to its pleasant fragrance.
